_instructions: REAL-RECORD VALIDATION CASE (level-2), COMPLETED. TOKI/GYO project disclosure 'Projede Benzer Nitelikte Olan Bagimsiz Bolumlerin Ortalama Satis Fiyatlari (31 Aralik 2019 tarihi itibariyle)' for Park Mavera III (PMVR3), manually audited by the operator. METHODOLOGICAL CORE: the disclosure reports TWO DISTINCT aggregate populations - OFFERED inventory (84 units) and CUMULATIVE REALIZED sales (387 units). These are NOT the same units, so they are NOT a paired reference->realized observation: NO synthetic pair and NO closing discount between 1,172,785.71 and 997,375.19 is computed. This record is therefore NOT a RealizedLabel; it is represented as TWO unpaired aggregate observations (observation_model=aggregate_observation) that lack realized_price/reference_price by construction and are EXCLUDED from asking_to_closing_labels(). The adapter normalizes the operator-extracted structured table fields (no raw PDF parsing). Room-type strata are preserved by the schema (strata field); the per-room-type rows were NOT part of this transcription and can be appended later without changing the audited cohort aggregates.

manifest.notes: Park Mavera III (PMVR3) as of 2019-12-31. UNPAIRED aggregates: offered_inventory count=84 total=98,514,000.00 avg=1,172,785.71; cumulative_realized_sales count=387 total=385,984,197.52 avg=997,375.19. NOT paired -> no reference->realized, no closing discount. Represented as two aggregate observations; excluded from asking_to_closing_labels(). parser_version here pins the AGGREGATE parser (1.0.0), independent of the paired PARSER_VERSION.
